description: HTML file for the Database Viewer web interface, including styles and scripts for browsing databases, tables, and viewing data.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases and displays them in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets UI state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Toggles display of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads and displays tables within a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data from a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Builds HTML table from data array.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content based on value type.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for wide or object data.
